title: Update company email to insightresearchblr@gmail.com across all pages and sections

requirements.text: Update the company email address to 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' everywhere it appears across the site — including the Contact page, Footer, Navigation (if shown), and any other component or metadata that displays contact details. Note: the user typed 'gmal.com' but the correct domain is 'gmail.com' as already recorded in the project state.
acceptanceCriteria: The email 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' appears in the Footer component wherever contact details are shown.
The email 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' appears on the Contact page in the contact info block.
No outdated or placeholder email address remains anywhere on the site.
The mailto link (if present) correctly points to insightresearchblr@gmail.com.

constraints: Use 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' — the user input contained a typo ('gmal.com') which must be corrected to 'gmail.com'.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not alter any other contact details (phone, address, company name).
nonGoals: Changing the phone number or physical address.
Adding new contact fields or form inputs.
